parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber
actor PowerUser
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodUI" as UI
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodCTRL" as CTRL
participant ":RoomList" as RoomList
participant ":Room" as Room
participant ":Device" as Device
participant ":ReadConfigFile" as ReadConfigFile
participant ":ReadingList" as ReadingList
participant ":Reading" as Reading

activate PowerUser
PowerUser -> UI : Get Total Metered\nEnergy Consumption
activate UI
UI --> PowerUser : Show Options: Device,Room,Grid
PowerUser -> UI : Choose Room option
UI -> CTRL : rLs=showRoomListInStr()
activate CTRL
CTRL -> RoomList : rLs=showRoomListInStr()
activate RoomList
RoomList --
deactivate RoomList
UI --> PowerUser : Show Room List
PowerUser -> UI : Choose a Room
UI --> PowerUser : Ask for the time interval
PowerUser -> UI : Input the time interval
UI -> CTRL : tMe=getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(index, start, end)
CTRL -> Room : tMe=getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(index, start, end)
activate Room
Room -> Device : tMe = getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(start, end)
activate Device
Device -> ReadConfigFile : i=getDevicesMeteringPeriod()
activate ReadConfigFile
ReadConfigFile --
deactivate ReadConfigFile
Device -> ReadingList : tMe=getValueOfReadings\nInTimeInterval(start, end)
activate ReadingList
ReadingList -> Reading : v=returnValueOfReading
activate Reading
Reading --
deactivate Reading
ReadingList --
deactivate ReadingList
Device --
deactivate Device
Room --
deactivate Room
CTRL --
deactivate CTRL
UI --> PowerUser : Show Total Metered Energy\nConsumption in the Room
deactivate UI
deactivate PowerUser
@enduml
```
